person.name: Laderina de Brus
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Laderana youngest was born ca 1240. Her siblings births in period 1225-1240.

Childrens birth dates most likely from 1260-1282. Children and their descendants have some useful sources. Joan and Lucy were adjusted closer to 1280 and Eva may need to be adjusted ( may be from 1st marriage, Walter DeCarlton/Carlton (1237-1262) don't have sources right now).

Locations and dates are uncertain. the castle of the Bruces at Skelton Yorkshire was with the profile, so it may be generic choice. Ladarana controlled Kentmere and Carlton, after her fathers death 1268. The Bellew family would have been centered around Yorkshire and Northumberland estates. 

Laderana has a significant pedigree. Laderana was a descendant of the Bruce family back to Adam and wife Aumale, St Clair to Dukes of Normandie. On the maternal side, Lancaster, Stuteville, Warenne to Capet and Normandie.

1311 After the death of John de Bellewe, tenant by the courtesy of England after the death of Laderana his wife (dead in 1308) of inter alia the manor of Kentemere, of the inheritance of Nicholas de Stapleton, son and heir of Sibyl, one of the daughters and heirs of the said Laderana, and of Joan, wife of Aucher Fitz-Henry, another daughter and heir of Laderana, 1301 John de Bellewe held at his death the dale of Kentemer in Kendale (extent given) of the king in chief for the 6th part of a knight's fee; Nicholas, son of Isabel, daughter of the said John and Laderine his wife, sometime the wife of Miles de Stapleton, deceased, aged 15, and Joan another daughter of John and Laderine, aged 24, are his heirs.

1272 After the death of Peter de Brus the dale of Kentmere was assigned to the pourparty of John de Bellewe (De Bella Aqua) and Laderina his wife, youngest of the sisters and co-heirs of the said Peter, received Kentmere and Carlton.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Laderina de Brus於1241年出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓時，她的父親Sir Peter de Brus II52歲，母親Helewisa de Lancaster38歲。她和John de Bellew至少有2個女兒。她去世於1308年在她的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laderina de Brus于1241年出生在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Peter de Brus II52岁，母亲Helewisa de Lancaster38岁。她和John de Bellew至少有2个女儿。她去世于1308年在她的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Laderina de Brus was born in 1241, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Peter de Brus II, was 52 and her mother, Helewisa de Lancaster, was 38. She had at least 2 daughters with John de Bellew. She died in 1308, in her hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laderina de Brus est née en 1241, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter de Brus II, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Helewisa de Lancaster, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec John de Bellew. Elle est décédée en 1308, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laderina de Brus 1241 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Peter de Brus II 52 und ihre Mutter Helewisa de Lancaster 38. Sie hatte mit John de Bellew mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1308 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laderina de Brus è nata il nel 1241 nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Peter de Brus II, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Helewisa de Lancaster, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con John de Bellew. Morì nel 1308, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Laderina de Brusが1241年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Peter de Brus IIは52歳，母Helewisa de Lancasterは38歳であった。彼女はJohn de Bellewとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1308年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Laderina de Brus(이)가 1241년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Peter de Brus II(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewisa de Lancaster(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 John de Bellew(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laderina de Brus nasceu em 1241, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter de Brus II, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Helewisa de Lancaster, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com John de Bellew. Ela faleceu em 1308, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laderina de Brus родилась в 1241 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Peter de Brus II было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Helewisa de Lancaster, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от John de Bellew. Она умерла в 1308 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laderina de Brus nació en 1241, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Peter de Brus II, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Helewisa de Lancaster, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con John de Bellew. Murió en 1308, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
